Sec. 1  
Ẹ wo bawọn ṣọja ṣe doju ibọn kọ awọn ọdọ ni Lekki  
Lekki is a major urban center in Nigeria, known for its economic and cultural significance. It is one of the fastest-growing cities in the country, with a diverse population and a thriving business environment. The city is home to several important institutions, including the University of Lagos and the Federal University of Technology, Lagos. Lekki is also a hub for innovation and entrepreneurship, attracting many young professionals and startups.
